{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175346FB9FA7BE8493B6F84858"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613816318195548990","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星以示鼓励，写的还行到目前为止没有毒点，节奏偏中等，目前出场的配角戏份中都有高光点，主角更是有一股左阳和鬼面疮的味儿，好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772734482,"group_id":"7494285432369187902","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9fcGy0dqojNEG0p6MmItUM=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/864226b76fa0457c8e76d65836e88e6e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528565&x-signature=C7%2Byz90E6T2ObI3e4NGuaN8nOzg%3D","user_id":"83160257791308","user_name":"不服就去亖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"83160257791308","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7494285432369187902","book_info":{"abstract":"（灵异复苏+群像+无女主+异能）
赤月高悬，夜色如血；烈日沉沦，白昼永别。人类的时代，悄然落幕；怪物的狂欢，拉开帷幕。

你有没有一种经历：做一个重复的梦。
王呤有个秘密，从小时候起，他每天都会做同一个梦——
尽管，每次醒来，梦中的一切就像蒙上了一层纱，看不清，也摸不透，但他就是知道，那是同一个梦。而在他的眼中，世界布满诡异，现实与虚幻的界限时常恍惚。
直到——血色吞没苍穹，滚烫的月光夺走了他的双目，他却终于看到了世界的真相……
……
“所以你让我一个瞎子去捉鬼？”
“对。”
“可我什么也看不见。”
“那正好，谁会提防一个瞎子呢？”
……好像有点道理？
……
于是，在所有人震惊的目光里，角落那个瘦弱的青年，用盲杖精准地抵住宿主的脑袋，轻声开口：“捉到你了。”
不是，你一个瞎子，到底谁捉谁啊！
……
而这一切的一切，都要从一个高中，一场血色的补习开始说起……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/734eb54dede4a65a69956b08381a38b8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"无山岩","author_id":"","book_id":"7494285432369187902","book_name":"灵异复苏：你让我一个瞎子抓鬼？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2112人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7494285495178904126","read_count":"2112","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"167426"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"74","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,无女主,无后宫,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/734eb54dede4a65a69956b08381a38b8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184426&x-signature=8CS%2BoQbJjOkLHCNIUu%2BZEpxH9TI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3536450171450263","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"51"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175346FB9FA7BE8493B6F84858"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_co
